actor: One taking notes from a director
algae: Pond growth that can turn a lake green
amber: Fossilized resin, or its warm hue
bagel: Brunch ring with a chewy bite
chili: Last entry in the bundled lexicon
cider: Autumn drink that may be mulled
cloud: Sky mass with a silver lining
cocoa: Powder in a mug of hot chocolate
crane: Bird with long legs or a construction giant
crown: Top of a tooth, or of a king
eases: Takes the drama down a notch
ember: Glowing bit in a dying fire
frost: It may coat a windshield overnight
fruit: Produce-section category for apples and pears
label: Bundled-lexicon entry between "lobby" and "libel"
latte: Espresso drink with lots of milk
lemon: Sour citrus or a dud purchase
mango: Tropical fruit with a big pit
music: Art form with scales and chords
radar: Tracking system that uses radio waves
scent: Trace picked up by a bloodhound
snail: Slow walker carrying its whole rent situation
sushi: Rice roll with a soy sauce side
tides: Rises and falls of the sea
title: Bundled-lexicon entry between "tidal" and "total"
water: It may be still or sparkling
